- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 20, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Maaaattu_, Feb 20, 2026, 2/5: "The AI is very dumb and slow, also the whole app is glitchy. Would not buy the premium again"
            2. _Glitter Blood_, Jul 14, 2026, 3/5: "Useful app which definitely helps with my adhd task initiation/keeping track, so lots of potential but it is quite buggy - the latest update has meant I can no longer move one days tasks to the next or to a different day - when I click them to move it nothing happens. Also annoying that if you don’t want to schedule specific times to do each task on the daily view tab, you can’t reorder them. Trying to set times is impractical and time consuming unless it’s a specific thing like a meeting, ideally you’d be able to create high to low priority on the day view, or at least reorder them easily so you can see which order you need do the tasks in - every time I try to reorder, even if I seem to successfully move a task up or down, it puts it back to where it was before if I click off that page or close the app. Would also be helpful if completed tasks automatically delete after 30 days or something on the main prioritisation lists."
            3. _Alea-pea_, Jun 23, 2026, 3/5: "I really love this app and it has helped me immensely when it comes to getting organised– although it’s an ongoing process and I’m still learning! If this app worked the way it was intended I would have given it five stars however it often glitches on my iPhone laptop and iPad. These glitches can be very frustrating. I look forward to any improvements and to upgrading my rating to five stars. Many thanks for the app!"
